apple.evidence: version.txt and README.md in Apple source tree

windows.evidence: vcpkg.json and Windows source tree manifest 1.1 examples

path_mismatches: Previous validator mode set lacked project-context, edition-profile, manifest, dependencies, capabilities, module-isolation, and evidence modes.
Previous validator findings used legacy status/remediation_hint fields without required decision/evidence/remediation fields.
Older remediation-v2 and remediation-v3 evidence remains historical and is not the active package output path.
local_source_conflicts: A nested Windows tree under MCOS still shows schema 1.0 examples and was not used as the Windows 0.2.0 manifest 1.1 profile source.
